title: Analytics Events File
description: Defines analytics events organized by domains. Each YAML file contains one or more domains, each containing one or more events with their parameters.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: A logical grouping of related events (e.g., 'auth', 'purchase', 'navigation'). Domain keys must be snake_case when enforce_snake_case_domains is enabled.

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of the event's purpose and when it should be fired.
examples: User successfully completed the login flow
Item was added to the shopping cart

event_name.title: Custom Event Name
event_name.description: Override the generated event name that gets logged. If not set, the name is generated from the naming strategy template (e.g., '{domain}: {event}'). When strict_event_names is enabled, must not contain '{' or '}' interpolation characters.

identifier.title: Unique Identifier
identifier.description: Optional canonical identifier for the event, used for uniqueness checks. Generated from identifier_template if not set.

deprecated.title: Deprecated
deprecated.description: Marks the event as deprecated. Generates @Deprecated annotation in Dart code.

replacement.title: Replacement Event
replacement.description: The name of the replacement event if this event is deprecated.

added_in.title: Added In Version
added_in.description: Version when this event was added.

deprecated_in.title: Deprecated In Version
deprecated_in.description: Version when this event was deprecated.

dual_write_to.title: Dual Write To
dual_write_to.description: List of other event names to trigger simultaneously when this event is logged. Useful for migration periods.

meta.title: Metadata
meta.description: Custom metadata for this event (e.g., ownership, Jira tickets, documentation links).

parameters.title: Event Parameters
parameters.description: Map of parameter definitions for this event. Keys are parameter names. Values can be: a type string ('string', 'int?'), a full parameter object, or null to reference a shared parameter.

oneOf.title: Simple Type
oneOf.description: Shorthand: just the type name. Append '?' for nullable.

oneOf.title: Shared Parameter Reference
oneOf.description: Null value means this parameter is defined in shared parameters.
